sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n98074" key="suhbo/los" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σῠηβόλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n98074.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">striking</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">killing swine</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:2:27" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.27</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
